videos.headline: Vanderbilt Commodores vs. South Carolina Gamecocks: Full Highlights
videos.description: Vanderbilt Commodores vs. South Carolina Gamecocks: Full Highlights

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Vanderbilt Commodores vs. South Carolina Gamecocks: Full Highlights) 2025/09/13 ESHEET

videos.headline: Highlight: Pavia, Vanderbilt dominate Sellers-less South Carolina
videos.description: Diego Pavia leads the Commodores' balanced attack as they roll the Gamecocks who struggle to find any offense after LaNorris Sellers leaves the game in the second quarter, 31-7.

videos.headline: Diego Pavia airs it out for 18-yard touchdown pass
videos.description: Diego Pavia airs it out for 18-yard touchdown pass

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Diego Pavia airs it out for 18-yard touchdown pass) 2025/09/13 ESHEET

videos.headline: Rahsul Faison crosses goal line for 7-yard rushing touchdown
videos.description: Rahsul Faison crosses goal line for 7-yard rushing touchdown

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Rahsul Faison crosses goal line for 7-yard rushing touchdown) 2025/09/13 ESHEET

videos.headline: Diego Pavia connects for 5-yard TD pass
videos.description: Diego Pavia connects for 5-yard TD pass

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Diego Pavia connects for 5-yard TD pass) 2025/09/13 ESHEET

videos.headline: LaNorris Sellers injured after targeting penalty on Vanderbilt defender
videos.description: South Carolina quarterback LaNorris Sellers goes down after a big hit from Vanderbilt's Langston Patterson, which results in an ejection for Patterson.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (LaNorris Sellers injured after targeting penalty on Vanderbilt defender) 2025/09/13 ESHEET

videos.headline: Jamezell Lassiter takes it to the house for Vanderbilt
videos.description: Jamezell Lassiter breaks free for a 44-yard touchdown, putting Vanderbilt up 21-7 vs. South Carolina.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Jamezell Lassiter takes it to the house for Vanderbilt) 2025/09/13 ESHEET

videos.headline: Justin Okoronkwo shuts down Vanderbilt with INT in end zone
videos.description: Justin Okoronkwo intercepts Vanderbilt in the end zone and returns it 21 yards for the Gamecocks.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Justin Okoronkwo shuts down Vanderbilt with INT in end zone) 2025/09/13 ESHEET
NCF_One-Play (Brock Taylor kicks 51-yard field goal) 2025/09/13 ESHEET

videos.description: Bryce Cowan drops opposing QB for the sack

videos.headline: Touchdown! Sedrick Alexander scores vs. South Carolina
videos.description: Sedrick Alexander runs for 2-yard rushing touchdown

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Touchdown! Sedrick Alexander scores vs. South Carolina) 2025/09/13 ESHEET

videos.headline: Clark Lea says Vanderbilt 'does the right things the right way'
videos.description: Lea discusses how the Commodores' have built a rich culture within their program and says he is proud of his guys for getting a big win over the No. 11 Gamecocks.

videos.headline: Miles Capers thankful for the opportunity to 'keep swinging'
videos.description: Capers highlights the brotherhood the Commodores have built and says he is grateful for the opportunity to play football at Vanderbilt.
